apps.name: Glow for Facebook
apps.subtitle: Cleaner. Smarter. Yours.
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Download whatever you like — videos, images, Reels, and even stories
- Stay unseen. View stories and mark them as seen only when you want to
- Worried about accidental likes? Now you can relax
- Flexible, intuitive settings — all tailored to you

Glow settings are available via long press on any tab

versions.localizedDescription:
Glow v1.3.1
- Faster video re-encoding by improved audio processing
- Added support for Turkish language

apps.name: Flow for Messenger
apps.subtitle: A lightweight Messenger enhancer
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Remove ads
- Remove stories banner
- Remove 'People you may know'
- Disable typing indicator
- Read messages anonymously
- Watch stories anonymously
- Loop stories
- Download stories
- Remove 'Stories' tab
- Remove 'Friends' tab
- Remove AI circle
- Require call confirmation

apps.name: Infuse Plus (iOS18+)
apps.subtitle: Enhancer for Infuse app
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Requires iOS 18+
- Pro features
- Background playback
- Double tap to Play/Pause gesture
- Custom seek time for Seek Forward/Backward buttons
- Custom double tap to skip time
- And more

Note: Infuse Plus preferences can be found in the Settings tab

versions.localizedDescription:
Infuse Plus v2.5

- Tweak core has been fully rewritten
- Settings have been optimized for iPad
- Improved gesture interaction
- Fixed an issue with the loop button visibility
- Added overlay lock feature
- Added vertical and horizontal video mirroring
- Added an option to mute the player only
- Added support for Infuse 8.2.5 and later

Infuse Plus v2.5

- Tweak core has been fully rewritten
- Settings have been optimized for iPad
- Improved gesture interaction
- Fixed an issue with the loop button visibility
- Added overlay lock feature
- Added vertical and horizontal video mirroring
- Added an option to mute the player only
- Added support for Infuse 8.2.5 and later

Infuse Plus v2.5

- Tweak core has been fully rewritten
- Settings have been optimized for iPad
- Improved gesture interaction
- Fixed an issue with the loop button visibility
- Added overlay lock feature
- Added vertical and horizontal video mirroring
- Added an option to mute the player only
- Added support for Infuse 8.2.5 and later

apps.name: YouTube Plus (iOS16+)
apps.subtitle: YouTube Plus with additional tweaks
apps.localizedDescription:
This version contains YouTube Plus, YouPiP, YTUHD, Return YouTube Dislikes and Open in Safari extension

Features:
- Download videos, audio (including audio track selection), thumbnails, posts, and profile pictures
- Copy video, comment, and post information
- Interface customization: Remove feed elements, reorder tabs, enable OLED mode, and as use Shorts-only mode
- Player settings: Gestures, default quality, preferred audio track
- Save, Load and Restore settings. Clear cache once or automatically on app startup
- Built-in SponsorBlock
- And much, much more

YouTube Plus preferences can be found in the YouTube settings

versions.localizedDescription:
YouTube Plus v5.2

IMPORTANT: Starting from this version, YTPlus requires an active Patreon subscription for full access. If you prefer free usage, please stay on version 5.2b4.

ADDED:
- Added Settings search (Settings fully rewritten)
- Added Discord RPC integration
- Added option to hide video title in fullscreen
- Added native Sleep timer, available from overlay and tab bar, including YouTube v19.x.x
- Added post and comment translation via long press
- Added new playback speed mode. The old one is now called Standard (up to 5x), and the new one Advanced (up to 10x)
- Added new YouTube logo selector for Navigation bar
- Added new icons, adapted to YouTube style
- Added format and codec display when selecting video download quality
- Added ability to seek instead of skipping to next/previous track via Control Center
- Added option to remove tracking from tapped links (without it, Google first opens its analytics site before redirecting to the actual URL)
- Added option to hide posts in Shorts
- Added information explaining why Cast does not work on newer versions for sideloaded builds
- Added option to force Shorts quality (quality selector from Shorts settings removed as it was not working in 50% of cases)
- Added Hype, Music, Live, Gaming, Sports, Notifications tabs
- Added a login reminder
- Added minimum duration to skip sponsor segments

IMPROVED:
- Improved Shorts to regular video — videos now open on tap (previously Shorts player was shown first, then the regular player)
- Improved Hold to speed in Shorts — both sides can now be selected simultaneously instead of only one
- Improved Hold to speed gesture behavior in Shorts
- Improved SponsorBlock segment skipping mechanism
- Improved YouTube Plus' player toast
- Improved automatic cache cleanup on launch
- Improved overlay menu buttons — changes now apply instantly (no app restart required)
- Improved overall iOS 14 compatibility
- Adapted settings for iPads
- Rewritten SponsorBlock core, and partially the YouTube Plus core itself in preparation for future updates
- Replaced native playback rate with a custom implementation:
- Supports speeds from 0.25x to 10.0x
- Tap-to-set speed via slider
- Compatible with YouTube 19.x.x and newer
- Long-press on ‘reset speed’ in overlay Speed Controls now opens the custom speed module

FIXED:
- Fixed playback issues
- Fixed authorization issues
- Fixed update issues
- Fixed fetch channels issues
- Fixed casting issues
- Fixed logo switching
- Fixed drag gesture blocking in Free Zoom mode (overlay)
- Fixed YouTube v19.x.x compatibility
- Fixed crashes on v21.15.4
- Fixed a bug on YouTube v19.x.x where videos from feed and search results would not open by taps
- Fixed OLED theme
- Fixed floating keyboard issue on iPad
- Fixed SponsorBlock segments display in progress bar
- Fixed custom colors for progress bar
- Fixed playback speed issues
- Fixed Speed controls issues
- Fixed Show playback end time issues
- Fixed live streams display in Shorts
- Fixed Shorts to regular video
- Fixed download issues when channel or video name is too long
- Fixed navigation bar's UI issues
- Fixed Native Share menu on v21.14.4
- Fixed sponsor segments and colored progress bar on v21.14.4
- Fixed no free zoom gesture option
- Fixed missing audio button when hiding Shorts UI elements
- REMOVED:

Removed 'Jump ahead with YouTube Premium' banner in player
- Removed channel product banners in and below the player
- Removed new ads from search results
- Removed startup banners prompting YouTube Premium subscription
- Removed Explore tab as Google has fully removed it server-side

apps.name: YouTube Music Ultimate (iOS16+)
apps.subtitle: The best enhancer for YouTube Music on iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Download audios, cover images
- Remove ads
- Background playback
- Interface customization: Remove tabs or other elements, enable OLED mode
- Player settings: Modify player elements, default playback mode
- Built-in SponsorBlock
- And much, much more

YouTube Music Ultimate preferences can be found under YouTube Music settings

versions.localizedDescription:
YouTube Music Ultimate v2.4.1

- Fixes login issues
- Adds cairo-style downloading icon

YouTube Music Ultimate v2.4.1

- Fixes login issues
- Adds cairo-style downloading icon

apps.name: OrwellVK
apps.subtitle: A subtle shift from the familiar
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Download everything you love: videos, episodes, clips, songs, stories, and even voice messages
- Incognito Mode: Become invisible. Browse posts, read messages, and publish entries without leaving a trace
- Chats: Manage your chats with ease: send voice and video messages, graffiti directly from the gallery. Pretend you're typing
- Simplicity: Intuitive and flexible settings that are easy to personalize
- And More: OrwellVK is not just about settings. It hides even more features for your comfort and privacy

OrwellVK preferences can be found in the VK Settings and Side menu

versions.localizedDescription:
OrwellVK v1.2

- Fixed clips downloading issue
- Fixed custom notch theming
- Improved downloading videos
- Improved downloading voice messages
- Improved per-message marking logic
- Improved logic for marking voice messages and videos as played
- Improved downloading music
 - Improved toast and download progress UI. Now you can also swipe up the toast to hide it
- Optimization for VK on iOS 26

- Huge thanks for 10K OrwellVK users ❤️

apps.name: Tweach
apps.subtitle: Download your favorite Clips, VODs and Live Streams with Tweach
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Download VODs, Live Streams and Clips in selected quality, including audio only
- Player customization: hide unwanted controls, live stats overlay, gestures, system player support and more
- Profile info including HQ profile picture, banner and offline banner downloading
- Tab bar customization: reorder and hide tabs, set startup tab
- Import, export and reset preferences, clear cache manually or automatically on startup

*Tweach preferences are available in the Twitch settings or by swiping up on the tab bar*

versions.localizedDescription:
Tweach v2.3.1:
- Added a save action for downloads
- Added a login reminder
- Added Italian localization (credits to basketshoe)
- Added Polish localization (credits to marcinmajsc)
- Fixed issues on Twitch v23.9 and added support for v28.9
- Fixed swipe-up gesture on devices without a notch
